place: Samsara Estate, Kamala Soi 16, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Cliffside Four-Bedroom Villa with 14-Metre Infinity Pool — Kamala
note: Private chef · beach shuttle · airport transfer
blurb: A four-bedroom villa on the west-coast cliffs of Kamala's Samsara Estate, its 14-metre infinity pool and covered sala sweeping out over the Andaman Sea. Sauna and steam room, a sea-view study and a family area sit across some 1,060 m² on a 1,600 m² plot, with a private chef and beach shuttle, sleeping up to eight.
detail:
Perched on the west-coast cliffs of Kamala's Samsara Estate, this four-bedroom villa balances a serene, pared-back architecture against a wide sweep of the Andaman Sea. Built across roughly 1,060 m² on a 1,600 m² plot, it is sized for a couple of families or a small group who want the view without the scale of a grand estate.

A 14-metre infinity pool runs toward the horizon, with a covered sala and BBQ set up for panoramic sea views and long lunches in the shade. Indoor and outdoor dining both look to the water and the sunset.

Inside, a spacious living room, a study with sea views, a TV room and a family area give the house more than one place to settle, alongside a fully equipped kitchen. A sauna and steam room handle the wellness side, and covered parking takes two cars.

A private chef and estate support run the day-to-day, with housekeeping, turndown, one return airport transfer and a complimentary twice-daily beach shuttle included; car hire, massage, laundry and a wine selection are arranged on request. The estate is gated with 24-hour security.

features.l: Covered sala & BBQ with panoramic sea views
Study with sea views & family area
≈1,060 m² on a 1,600 m² gated plot
